titleStmt.title: SII 24.144: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 144. (A.R. No. 146 of 1938-39.) V PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL, TO THE RIGHT OF CHOKKAPPĀṈAI GŌPURAM.

summary.p: Registers gift of lands in Nagaikku-Māṅguḍi alias Rājēndraśōḻapuram and three other neighbouring villages clubbing them together under the name Ayaṇḍambākkiḻāṉ-brahmadēyam by Tiruvaṉantamūtti(mūrti) Aruḷālaṉ alias Vīrarājēndra-Pallavaraiyaṉ, the Kiḻāṉ of Ayaṇḍambākkam in Āguḍi-nāḍu, a subdivision of Puḻaṟkōṭṭam alias Vikramaśōḻavaḷanāḍu, a district of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam, to some Brāhmaṇas settled by him in the Rājamahēndran-tiruvīdi at Tiruvaraṅgam. Tribhuvaṉachakravartin Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ in whose 24th year and the 225th day the record is dated, may be identical with Kulōttuṅga Chōḷa III whose surname Vīrarājēndra was adopted by the donor. Mention is made of the Piḍāri Aiyapoḻil Mākāḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattup puḻaṟ koṭṭamāṉa vikkirama coḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Ākuṭi nāṭṭu Ayaṇṭam pākkiḻāṉ tiruvaṉantamutti Aruḷāḷaṉāṉa virarājendrappallavaraiyaṉ pāṇṭi kulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkattu rājamahendraṉ tiruvitiyil vaittu brāhmaṇar tu nālvarkkukSee for note on text line 1, No. 145 below.kāṇiyāka Ivaṉ vilai koṇṭu tanta
rājagambhīravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu nakaikku māṅkuṭiyāṉa rājendracoḻapuram nilam muppattu Aiñcaraiye Irumāvaraiye Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ Orumāvarai muntiri kaik kiḻ nālumāvil Ivvūrp piṭāri Aiyapoḻil mākāḷikku Ūrk kiḻ Iṟai yilāṉa viḷainilaṅkālum puṉpayir nilam Irumāvaraiyum Āka nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum pottakappaṭi Āka vanta nilam nikki nikkiniṉṟa nilamu
m Īcāṉa maṅkalamāṉa virutarājabhayaṅkarac caruppeti maṅkalattu taram peṟṟa nilam patiṉoṉṟaraiye yaraimā muntirikaik kiḻ mukkālil muṉṟu māvaraikkāṇiyum maṇaṟkuṭi taram peṟṟa nilam patiṉmuṉṟe mukkāle nālumāk kāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mukkāleyiraṇṭu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum māceṉaimaṅkalamāṉa vāḻaikkuṟicciyil taram peṟṟa nilam Aiñce
kālum muṉnuṭaiyārum paḻam perum veḷḷāṉūrkku ṉiṉṟum kūṭukiṟa nilam veḷḷāṉ vakai mutalum rājendracoḻapuram Eṇṇai nakarattukku mutaluntavirntu Ivaṉ tantapaṭiyey taṅkaḷukkuk kāṇiyāy Irupattu nālāvatu pacāṉa mutal Ayaṇṭampākkiḻāṉ brahmadeyam Eṉṉum perāl Orūrākak kūṭṭi lattukkuk kaṭamaiyiṟukkum Iṭattu muṉpu mutal
koṇṭu varukiṟa pa rājendracoḻapurattukkut toṇṭaimāṉ Iṟukka niccayittappaṭiyum nikki niṉṟa nilattukku Ivvūrkaḷ Ivaṉ Iṟukka niccayitta paṭiyil Aṉupokap paṭiyum Āy Iṟukkum nellu Eṇṇāyirattu nāṟpattu Eḻu kalaṉetūṇippatakkilum puṉ payirāl muṉṉūṟṟu muppa mākkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻkkāllum taṅkaḷ yāka Uttarāaya
ṇattu nām nirvāttu vāyirattu munnūṟṟu Eṇpattu Aiṅkalamum puṉpayirināṟ kācu nūṟṟu muppattunāle Eḻumākkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mukkālum tavirntu nīkki niṉṟa nellu nālāyirattu Aṟunūṟṟu Aṟupattu Iru kalaṉe tūṇippatakkum kārmaṟuvum Orupūvum kamukum koṭiyum Uḷḷiṭṭu canti ceytu Irupattu nālāvatu pacāṉa mutal taṇṭa mutalāy Innelliru
pattu muṉṟāl vanta nellu kārilum nikki niṉṟa nellu pacāṉattilum Iṟukka kkaṭavum Iṉnilattu virutarājabhayaṅkarac caruppetimaṅkalattum maṇaṟkuṭiyum cempiyaṉ vaḻaikkuṟicciyum niṉṟu kūṭukiṟa nilattukku Ūrk kiḻ Iṟaiyiliyil kuntāli veṭṭiyāṉ Iṟaiyiliyum vāṇikajivitam Āṉa nilam nikki nikkiniṉṟa nila kapoti Eṟṟātoḻiyavum kaṭavatākavum veṇum Eṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉ namak
kuccoṉṉamaikku Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac colla kaṇakkilum Iṭṭuk koḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷāka varik kūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉom Innilam Irupattu nālāvatu pacāṉa mutal virarājendrappallavaraiyaṉ tanta paṭiyey taṅkaḷukkuk kāṇiyāka Aṉupavittu Ippaṭi kaṭamai Iṟuttu ṉa tirumantira Ōlai muventa veḷāṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa coḻappirutikaṅkaraiyar viḻiñattaraiyar cera
māṉār toṇṭaimāṉār nikarili coḻappallavaraiyar paṅkaḷattaraiyar . Irupattu nālāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟirupattu Aiñciṉāl ḥ§
Digital edition of SII 24.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
